title: Dashboards for multiple boards don't work
excerpt:

Table 


*Chart

posts.author: jessiharborp (Jessi Harbor)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need the ability to report on what work has been completed this week as well as what work is scheduled for next week across multiple boards. I have tried dashboards for:

  • Workload

  • Table

*Chart
No matter what I select, it doesn’t let me select the boards I want to include in the widget. This is frustrating and limits my ability to use Monday to manage projects across multiple teams. I would love any help getting this to work or other reporting features.

image1584×835 42.9 KB

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jessiharborp - welcome! Normally when you create a new dashboard you are prompted with “what boards to connect” as per my screenshot below:

image615×710 26.1 KB

If the dashboard is already created, when in Edit mode, you have the ability to add the boards that will be available to your widgets:


image617×717 29.3 KB

Hope this helps and is what you are looking for!

Mark

Green Llamas
